global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a logo at the top, a headline in the center, and a call-to-action button at the bottom.
global.main_message: Promoting a quick dining solution with nearby favorites.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: PlateSprint logo
elements.description: A simple, stylized logo featuring the word 'PlateSprint' in a modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Dinner in minutes
elements.description: Bold, eye-catching text that reads 'Dinner in minutes' in a large font, centered in the lower part of the ad.
elements.text_content: Dinner in minutes Fresh favorites nearby

elements.label: Fresh favorites nearby
elements.description: Smaller text below the headline that says 'Fresh favorites nearby', providing additional context in a clean font.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Get offer', designed to stand out and encourage user interaction, located at the bottom of the ad.
